summary: We fixed a technical issue that was blocking the Pay Now button on your account. A previous payment attempt for Chaska's Spring balance had not finished correctly, which caused an "installment not available" message when you tried to pay again.
Your account is updated and ready. Easton's Spring 2026 enrollment is paid in full. Chaska's remaining Spring balance is $383.12.
To pay: sign in at accounts.americanseekersacademy.com, go to Payments → Upcoming Payments, and click Pay Now on Chaska's row. Complete checkout with your card.
If anything still looks wrong after you refresh the page, reply to this email and we'll help right away.
